# Technology Consultants

> A consulting practice run by builders. We design, build, and operate React web applications and AI agents for startups, SMBs, and mid-market teams.

## Services
- [React & Full-Stack Web Development](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/services/react-web-development.html) — Dedicated service page detailing stack, type safety, SLAs, and engineering workflow.
- [AI Agent Consulting](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/services/ai-agent-consulting.html) — Detailed service page covering LLM pipelines, prompt caching, human-in-the-loop, and MCP.

## Engagement Models
- [Fixed-scope project](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/#how) (4 - 16 weeks) — Best for MVPs, redesigns, AI integrations.
- [Monthly retainer](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/#how) (month-to-month) — Best for fractional CTO & scaling capacity.
- [Strategy sprint](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/#how) (1 - 2 weeks) — Fixed price AI audits and roadmaps.
- [Partnership / equity](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/#how) (12+ months) — Long-term technical investment.

## Founder Credentials
- **Roberto Guido**: Founder & Principal Engineer. BS Electrical Engineering (UC San Diego), MBA (NYU Stern).
- Experienced in voice AI design (Encounter AI), 2024 Technical Resident in AI or Cybersecurity (TRAC) at Colorwave, and enterprise integrations with Workday Finance & Workday Adaptive Planning.

## Portfolio & Production Products
- **Appt Helper** ([appthelper.com](https://appthelper.com)) — 24/7 monitor and instant SMS alerts for Global Entry & SENTRI slots.
- **Open Cita** ([opencita.com](https://opencita.com)) — Spanish localized monitor engine for Trusted Traveler program.
- **Border Bills** — Utility payment app for Mexican bills from the US.
- **Baja Care** — Intake & discovery platform for vetted healthcare providers in Baja California.

## Spanish / Localization (Mexican Spanish)
- [Inicio en Español](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/es/) — Localized home page.
- [Desarrollo Web React (ES)](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/es/services/react-web-development.html) — React consulting in Spanish.
- [Consultoría de Agentes de IA (ES)](https://technologyconsultants.ventures/es/services/ai-agent-consulting.html) — AI agent consulting in Spanish.
